creator: legatvs@gmail.com
text:
I'm sending a shar instead of a patch this time. It seemed more
appropriate due to a large number of changes since 2.1.14.

Please note that 2.2.0 update was submitted about a week ago:
    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=135582
    
I've tried to reach Nicola, who took the PR/135582, for about
a week now but so far I haven't received anything back. As far
as I'm concerned the PR/135582 can be closed and replaced with
this one.

Thanks.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
